title: CheXpert: A Large Chest Radiograph Dataset with Uncertainty Labels and Expert Comparison
research_problem: 构建含 uncertain labels 的大规模 CXR 数据集
methods: rule-based labeler; U-Ignore; U-Zeros; U-Ones; U-SelfTrained; U-MultiClass; per-label comparison on 5 competition tasks
key_findings: 不同 pathology 的最佳 uncertainty strategy 不同; 最终模型对不同 competition labels 采用不同策略; U-SelfTrained 使用模型预测重标 uncertain labels
limitations: 主要看 5 个 clinically important/prevalent labels 和 AUROC; 未系统分析 label imbalance/uncertain-positive ratio/AUPRC/F1/Recall
relation_to_new_fyp: 核心基础文献; 本 FYP 聚焦 teacher-guided soft labels + label-level prior + imbalanced-label evaluation

title: Interpreting chest X-rays via CNNs that exploit hierarchical disease dependencies and uncertainty labels
research_problem: 利用 disease hierarchy 和 uncertainty labels 提升 CXR 多标签分类
key_findings: uncertainty label smoothing 和 hierarchy 可提升 AUC
limitations: 高性能 ensemble; rare-label analysis 不足
relation_to_new_fyp: 支撑 soft uncertainty handling; 本课题做 label-wise adaptive

title: Learn To Be Uncertain: Leveraging Uncertain Labels In Chest X-rays With Bayesian Neural Networks
research_problem: report uncertainty 与 model uncertainty 如何关联
key_findings: uncertain labels 可用于学习模型不确定性
limitations: workshop; 不聚焦 long-tail rare labels
relation_to_new_fyp: 说明 uncertain labels 不应简单丢弃

title: Towards long-tailed, multi-label disease classification from chest X-ray: Overview of the CXR-LT challenge
research_problem: long-tailed multi-label CXR 如何成为独立挑战
key_findings: CXR 同时有 long-tail multi-label 和 label co-occurrence
relation_to_new_fyp: 支撑 long-tailed multi-label 背景

title: CXR-LT 2024: A MICCAI challenge on long-tailed, multi-label, and zero-shot disease classification from chest X-ray
research_problem: long-tail multi-label zero-shot CXR 是否仍未解决
methods: challenge overview; gold set; multimodal comparison
key_findings: rare/unseen findings 仍是前沿挑战
relation_to_new_fyp: 说明 rare-label learning 仍活跃

title: CXR-LT: Multi-Label Long-Tailed Classification on Chest X-Rays
research_problem: 提供 long-tailed multi-label CXR benchmark
key_findings: 提供 long-tail CXR benchmark
relation_to_new_fyp: gap 支撑; 主实验可用 CheXpert

title: ChestX-ray8: Hospital-scale Chest X-ray Database and Benchmarks on Weakly-Supervised Classification and Localization
research_problem: 构建 CXR 弱监督多标签基准
key_findings: 推动 CXR 多标签分类研究
limitations: 标签噪声和 uncertainty 处理不足
relation_to_new_fyp: 对比 CheXpert 的 uncertainty labels

title: MIMIC-CXR, a de-identified publicly available database of chest radiographs with free-text reports
research_problem: 发布 CXR 图像和 reports 数据库
key_findings: 377k CXR and reports
relation_to_new_fyp: 说明报告不确定性是大规模 CXR 数据问题

title: PadChest: A large chest x-ray image dataset with multi-label annotated reports
research_problem: 多标签 CXR 报告数据集构建
key_findings: 160k+ CXR; rich taxonomy
relation_to_new_fyp: 支撑标签质量/不确定性背景

title: VinDr-CXR: An open dataset of chest X-rays with radiologist's annotations
research_problem: radiologist-annotated CXR 数据集
key_findings: 18k CXR; 28 findings
relation_to_new_fyp: 人工标注参考; 非主实验

title: CheXbert: Combining Automatic Labelers and Expert Annotations for Accurate Radiology Report Labeling Using BERT
research_problem: 提升 radiology report labeling 质量
key_findings: CheXbert 优于 rule-based labeler
relation_to_new_fyp: 说明 uncertainty/labeler quality 会影响训练标签

title: VisualCheXbert: Addressing the Discrepancy Between Radiology Report Labels and Image Labels
research_problem: report labels 与 image labels 差异
key_findings: image labels 与 report labels 存在 discrepancy
limitations: 出版状态需进一步核验
relation_to_new_fyp: 支撑自动标签不是完美 ground truth

title: Effect of Radiology Report Labeler Quality on Deep Learning Models for Chest X-Ray Interpretation
research_problem: report labeler 质量是否影响 image model
key_findings: 更好 labeler 改善 downstream model
relation_to_new_fyp: 说明 label handling 会影响模型学习

title: Label Co-Occurrence Learning With Graph Convolutional Networks for Multi-Label Chest X-Ray Image Classification
research_problem: 利用 CXR label co-occurrence
key_findings: label co-occurrence 有助多标签分类
relation_to_new_fyp: label-wise strategy 可讨论 label dependencies

title: Label correlation guided discriminative label feature learning for multi-label chest image classification
venue: Computer Methods and Programs in Biomedicine
research_problem: label correlation 如何改善 CXR 多标签分类
methods: global/local label correlation; supervised contrastive learning
key_findings: label correlation guided learning 提升分类
relation_to_new_fyp: 支撑 label-wise adaptive 而非 overall-only

title: Label-wise reliability-aware classifier for robust chest X-ray multi-label classification
research_problem: partial label noise 和 tail-class vulnerability
methods: label-wise reliability; KNN smoothing; hierarchical loss
key_findings: label-wise 处理改善 tail-class robustness
limitations: 复杂方法不宜本科完整复现
relation_to_new_fyp: 最新 label-wise/tail-label 方向证据

title: Class-Balanced Loss Based on Effective Number of Samples
research_problem: long-tail reweighting
key_findings: 比 inverse-frequency 更稳定
relation_to_new_fyp: rare-label baseline/discussion

title: Focal Loss for Dense Object Detection
research_problem: 类别不平衡下降低 easy negatives 影响
key_findings: 改善 dense detection imbalance
relation_to_new_fyp: imbalance baseline

title: Learning Imbalanced Datasets with Label-Distribution-Aware Margin Loss
research_problem: long-tail decision boundary 调整
key_findings: margin loss 改善 tail classes
relation_to_new_fyp: 说明 rare-label 问题不能只看 overall AUROC

title: On Calibration of Modern Neural Networks
research_problem: 模型概率是否可靠
key_findings: 现代网络常 overconfident
relation_to_new_fyp: optional reliability analysis

title: Deep learning model calibration for improving performance in class-imbalanced medical image classification tasks
research_problem: 不平衡医学图像校准是否改善性能
key_findings: calibration 可帮助阈值与性能
relation_to_new_fyp: secondary reliability evaluation

title: Understanding calibration of deep neural networks for medical image classification
venue: Computer Methods and Programs in Biomedicine
research_problem: 医学图像模型校准受何影响
key_findings: 性能与校准需共同评价
relation_to_new_fyp: optional ECE/Brier analysis

title: Hidden Stratification Causes Clinically Meaningful Failures in Machine Learning for Medical Imaging
research_problem: 总体性能是否掩盖 subgroup failure
key_findings: overall metrics 可掩盖子群失败
relation_to_new_fyp: 支撑 common/medium/rare 分层评价

title: Underdiagnosis bias of artificial intelligence algorithms applied to chest radiographs in under-served patient populations
research_problem: CXR AI 是否 subgroup underdiagnose
key_findings: 平均性能掩盖 subgroup underdiagnosis
relation_to_new_fyp: 强化不能只看 overall AUROC

title: A Review of Uncertainty Estimation and its Application in Medical Imaging
research_problem: 医学影像不确定性估计综述
key_findings: uncertainty/reliability 是医学 AI 关键
relation_to_new_fyp: 区分 label uncertainty 与 predictive uncertainty
